channel.title: hackfest on Cédric Walter blog
channel.description: Recent content in hackfest on Cédric Walter blog
channel.copyright: Reproduction without explicit permission is prohibited. All Rights Reserved. All photos remain copyright © their rightful owners. No copyright infringement is intended.

item.title: m-Clippy WON Migros Category prize in Europe’s Biggest Hackathon Hack Zurich 2020
item.description: Since 2014, HackZurich unites the world’s best tech talents, selected from thousands of applications, representing several elite universities and leading organizations from +85 countries, to collaborate and develop innovative web-, mobile- and hardware applications during a 40-hours hackathon in teams.

item.title: BlockByte won Trust Square biggest blockchain Hackathon #SBHACK19
item.description: Last weekend I took part in the biggest Swiss Blockchain Hackathon #SBHACK19, and our team Lend-It won twice!
